HYPERTYPE
PlayFeaturesAboutLeaderboards
PLAY NOW

// SYNTHWAVE TYPING SHOOTER

HyperType

A fast-paced synthwave typing shooter. Type words to destroy enemies, build streaks, and chase high scores.

PLAY NOW

CORE LOOP

01

START

Enemy enters the screen.

02

IDENTIFY

Word appears above enemy.

03

ENGAGE

Type word to fire weapon.

04

DESTROY

Enemy is neutralized.

05

COMBO

Accuracy builds your streak.

06

RESULT

High scores and badges earned.

// FEATURES

TYPING MEETS ACTION

A hybrid genre where linguistic dexterity meets tactical positioning. Dodge until you spell.

THREE DIFFICULTY MODES

Beginner: 40px/s scroll speed

Challenging: 190px/s scroll speed

Insane: 400px/s scroll speed

ACHIEVEMENTS & PROGRESSION

Unlock over 25+ unique badges by hitting speed milestones and survival goals.

SYNTHWAVE AESTHETIC

100% original electronic soundtrack paired with neon-drenched pixel art landscapes.

PLAY ANY WAY

Jump in instantly as a Guest or create an Account to sync progress and climb the boards.

BOSS ENCOUNTERS

Face macro-sentinels requiring complex typing patterns under intense fire-rates.

TRACK YOUR PROGRESS

Total Words 0
Playtime (S) 0
Longest Streak 0
Accuracy 0%
Bosses Defeated 0
HS Level 0

Stats sync across sessions when you create a free account.

UNLOCK BADGES

Over 25+ achievements across 4 categories

◎

Accuracy

↯

Speed

◴

Endurance

※

Combat

N P T R W K I B F E L A
View all achievements in-game →

BUILT WITH MODERN TOOLS

  • <>Godot 4 & GDScript
  • ⊡Talo Game Services
  • ◎Optimized for Web Play

HyperType runs entirely in your browser. No installation. No downloads. Just type.

PLAY IN BROWSER →

READY TO TYPE?
